task_text: How much money did we make from the service line 'checklist  rewrite and rollout pack' since the beginning of January 2026? Answer with a number only

function.rulebook_notes: Completed identity bootstrap (tree/read/context), inspected 99_system before task work, read nested AGENTS.MD files for entered folders, and used exact invoice evidence.
function.outcome_justification: INV-0007 (issued_on 2026-01-19) includes line 'checklist rewrite and rollout pack' line_eur 390; INV-0008 (issued_on 2026-02-17) includes same line_eur 390. Summed revenue since 2026-01-01 through current context date 2026-03-30 equals 780.
